visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark brown hair and a maroon striped shirt stands in an indoor setting, likely a living room, with a beige sofa behind her. She holds two large transparent bags of orange-tinted snacks. Her facial expressions are animated, with wide eyes and a smile as she speaks directly to the camera. (2) The scene shifts to a kitchen environment where several pieces of the thin, yellowish-orange snacks are being heated in a black frying pan on a stovetop. The lighting is bright and even. (3) The view returns to the woman, now holding a white plate piled high with the crispy, triangular snacks. She appears extremely excited, gesturing with her hands and making wide-eyed expressions. (4) The woman is shown in close-up as she takes bites of the snacks. Her mouth is open as she bites into the crispy texture, and she looks directly at the camera with a satisfied and enthusiastic expression. The background remains the soft-toned indoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 上次介紹爆紅的越南米紙. [Logo]: @602avenue. (2) [Subtitle]: 三分之一左右. (3) [Subtitle]: 有點..吃膩了... (4) [Subtitle]: 然後我發現. (5) [Subtitle]: 在留言區有一位說. (6) [Subtitle]: 「烤過也很好吃」. (7) [Subtitle]: 你到底是誰. (8) [Subtitle]: 你真的是天才. (9) [Slogan]: 記得先收藏這部影片喔. (10) [Subtitle]: 用烤箱也可以，不過我比較懶. (11) [Subtitle]: 就直接用平底鍋煎. (12) [Subtitle]: 大概20秒就搞定!!! (13) [Variety]: (偷偷吃一片了). (14) [Variety]: (好吃到快瘋掉). (15) [Subtitle]: 外層酥酥的，一咬就化開了. (16) [Subtitle]: 那個酥脆度真的瘋掉. (17) [Variety]: 聽一下. (18) [Subtitle]: 這怎麼說呢~ (19) [Subtitle]: 在韓國吃過煎餅嗎? (20) [Subtitle]: 那個煎餅的邊角非常酥脆. (21) [Subtitle]: 一點都沒有麵漿的味道. (22) [Subtitle]: 有一點像那種口感!!! (23) [Variety]: (一般餅乾的酥脆感)的意思.... (24) [Subtitle]: 還是辣味. (25) [Subtitle]: 我不是在賣這個米紙啦. (26) [Subtitle]: 只是太好吃了，拜託大家一定要去買來試試. (27) [Slogan]: 記得一定要烤著吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator speaking to the camera throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a maroon and white horizontally striped long-sleeve shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor living room with a beige fabric sofa and soft lighting, and a kitchen area featuring a black frying pan on a stovetop.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female voice speaking Chinese with a Taiwanese accent. The background music is an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic track with a strong bass beat. Her tone is very enthusiastic and bright. (2) A transition whoosh sound effect is heard as the scene shifts. The sound of light sizzling or popping is heard, indicating food being heated in a pan, layered over the continuous BGM and voiceover. (3) Loud, crisp crunching sounds occur as the woman bites into the snack. These sounds have a wide spectral bandwidth and high transient intensity. (4) The woman continues speaking with high vocal arousal, her pitch rising at the end of sentences for emphasis. The BGM remains constant until the end, providing a rhythmic backdrop to her rapid-fire narration.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem (getting tired of taste) -> Solution (frying/heating) -> Evidence/Review -> Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share a food hack for a popular Vietnamese rice paper snack. The creator explains that while she liked the snack initially, she found a way to make it even better by frying/heating it, leading to a much more satisfying and crispy texture, which she enthusiastically recommends to her viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly states she is not selling the product but just sharing it because it is delicious.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy social media food review with fast cuts, bright lighting, and clear focus on sensory details like crunching sounds and expressive facial reactions.
